mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, real_name, phone, account_type, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{phone}, #{accountType}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} LIMIT 1
